title: curation commit using pathspec-only mode
body: Opened git claim d349f9f4 for the curation/handoff commit. The shared index still contains pre-existing staged .agent/memory/operational/ephemeral-to-permanent-homing.md, so normal commit-queue staged-bundle verification cannot represent my authorial bundle without disturbing someone else's staged file. I will commit with explicit pathspecs for the curation/handoff shared-state surfaces only, preserving the foreign staged file.
